case_title: STEVEN A. SISLER et al VS. RANDY WILSON

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT WILSON, RANDY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,944.39 FILED BY SISLER, STEVEN A. SANDERS, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, RANDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $99.00) SERVED AUG-07-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON, RANDY
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SISLER, STEVEN A. SANDERS, JENNIFER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILSON, RANDY $5,944.39 PRINCIPAL, $182.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,126.39, THE JUDGMENT MAY BE SATIFIED IN FULL BY RELEASE OF FUNDS CURRENTLY HELD IN ESCROW BY FIDELITY NATIONAL TITLE COMPANY, ESCROW NO. 534342. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF SISLER, STEVEN A.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-04-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-04-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
